content.intro: Once a reference is complete, you can generate a formal PDF report. For HMOs and group lets with multiple applicants, the group referencing feature produces a combined report with a joint income assessment.

sections.title: How to Generate a Reference Report

steps.title: Open a Completed Reference
steps.content: Go to References V2 in the sidebar and click on a reference with Complete status to open the full detail view.

steps.title: Click Generate Report
steps.content: Click the 'Generate Report' button. The system produces a PDF summary covering income verification, employment status, credit check results, and landlord reference findings.

steps.title: For Group Lets — Click Group Report
steps.content: If you are referencing multiple applicants for the same property (e.g. an HMO), click 'Group Report' instead of individual report generation.

steps.title: Select All Applicants for the Property
steps.content: A selection panel appears. Tick all references for the same property that you want to include in the group report.

steps.title: Generate the Combined Report
steps.content: Click Generate. The group report shows all applicants side by side with a combined income assessment, making it easy to assess the affordability of the group as a whole.

sections.title: Group Reports for Student HMOs
sections.content: Group reports are particularly useful for student HMOs where individual affordability thresholds may not be met but the combined household income is sufficient. The report presents a combined income figure alongside individual breakdowns.
